name: Smoked Turkey Salad Calypso
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water to wild rice in pan to cover by 2 inches. Simmer covered for 35 to 40 minutes until rice is tender and starts to split open. Drain and cool under cold water.
2. Cook white rice and cool.
3. Spread coconut on baking pan and bake in 375°F oven for 10 minutes or until slightly brown, stirring occasionally. Cool.
4. Combine rices, pepper, onion, parsley, papaya, broccoli, walnuts, mandarin oranges, avocado, coconut, and turkey in a large bowl.
5. Whisk together dressing ingredients and toss with salad.
